title: The Mole.
content:
HUSBAND.
    The boy's my very image! See!
    Even the scars my small-pox left me!

    WIFE.
    I can believe it easily
    They once of all my senses reft me.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Friedrich Schiller, titled "The Mole.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
